name: Cake Pillow - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Cuddle up with the delightful Cake Pillow from Bullseye's Playground™. With its soft polyester knit cover and whimsical light pink design, this novelty plush pillow adds a fun pop to any room. Its 10x10 size makes it perfect for a cozy accent on your favorite chair or bed. Enjoy its playful shape while resting indoors, and let its cozy polyester fill offer comfort with every touch.
